## Description

<!-- Describe the changes in this PR and why they are needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / refactor (no functional change)

## Related issue(s)

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you added or updated. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (`npm run lint && npm run format:check`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix or feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] I have added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if this is a user-facing change
